  Tip: Try the Codex App. Run 'codex app' or visit https://chatgpt.com/codex?app-landing-page=true


› Create a file named hello.txt containing the word hi by running a shell command.


⚠ `[features].codex_hooks` is deprecated. Use `[features].hooks` instead.
Enable it with `--enable hooks` or `[features].hooks` in config.toml. See https://developers.openai.com/codex/config-basic#feature-flags for details.

⚠ 1 hook needs review before it can run. Open /hooks to review it.

• I’m going to create hello.txt in the current workspace with a single shell write, then verify its contents.

• The harness rejected an explicit escalation request under the current approval policy, so I’m retrying the requested shell command through the normal execution path.

✔ You approved codex to run printf 'hi\n' > hello.txt && cat hello.txt this time

• Ran printf 'hi\n' > hello.txt && cat hello.txt
  └ hi

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• Created hello.txt in /private/tmp/codex-spike; it contains:

  hi

─ Worked for 1m 08s ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


› Now edit hello.txt to change hi to hello, using apply_patch.


• I’ll patch hello.txt in place, replacing the existing hi line with hello.

• Edited hello.txt (+1 -1)
    1 -hi
    1 +hello


  Would you like to make the following edits?


› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for these files (a)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)

  Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
